goal: is_fixed_point(galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper), a) = (galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a) = a)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper), a)

goal: is_fixed_point(galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), b) = (galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b) = b)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), b)

goal: is_fixed_point(galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), lower(a)) = (galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, lower(a)) = lower(a))

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), lower(a))
